assets.description: Title/menu backdrop — retro-sun synthwave grid with a streaking car; OCTANE logo sits in the dark upper band. (cover-fit 800x600, JPEG q74, inlined as base64 in assetManifest; procedural gradient fallback on load failure).
assets.license: user-provided; project use approved by owner

assets.description: Game-over backdrop — red coupe under a stormy neon skyline; GAME OVER + run stats sit in the dark upper area. (cover-fit 800x600, JPEG q74, inlined as base64 in assetManifest; procedural gradient fallback on load failure).
assets.license: user-provided; project use approved by owner

assets.description: Leaderboard backdrop — car at left on a neon grid; the top-5 list sits in the dark right-hand column. (cover-fit 800x600, JPEG q74, inlined as base64 in assetManifest; procedural gradient fallback on load failure).
assets.license: user-provided; project use approved by owner

assets.description: New-high-score backdrop — celebratory neon-arch spark burst; NEW HIGH SCORE banner + initials sit top-centre. (cover-fit 800x600, JPEG q74, inlined as base64 in assetManifest; procedural gradient fallback on load failure).
